preamble: Diphthongization of [ʌ] towards [ai] involves the development of a high front off-glide, often coupled with fronting and lowering of the nucleus.

examples.note: Observed in various English dialects where the nucleus of the 'price' vowel varies from central to back positions.

sources: Ladefoged, P. (2001). A Course in Phonetics.
Alkire, T., & Rosen, C. (2010). Romance Philology.
